sql_array: CREATE TABLE sales (id INT, amount DECIMAL, sales_date DATE);
INSERT INTO sales (id, amount, sales_date) VALUES (1, 100.50, '2023-10-01');
INSERT INTO sales (id, amount, sales_date) VALUES (2, 200.75, '2023-10-02');
SELECT id, amount, SUM(amount) OVER (ORDER BY sales_date) AS running_total FROM sales;
UPDATE sales SET amount = amount * 1.1 WHERE sales_date < '2023-10-03';
